reason: This is a true/false recognition task over a list of candidate matrix identities (e.g. '(AB)^T = B^T A^T' vs 'AB = BA' vs 'tr(AB)=tr(A)tr(B)') asking which ALWAYS hold for all matrices; the answer is a verdict about universal quantification over all matrices, not a single number the solver computes from a specific instance, so there is no code-computable scalar answer_spec for it.
